Use mod outfits.Description: Enables and disables the mod's Fashion Sense Outfits features. If you disable this, you may uninstall Fashion Sense Outfits and/or Fashion Sense

Use mod portraits.Description: Enables and disables the mod's Farmer's Potrait features. If you disable this, you may uninstall Farmer's Portrait

Use background.Description: Enables and disables the mod's background files. If you disable this, you may use other farmer portriat background mods

More Player Emotions.Description: Enables and disables more player emotions; scared, surprise, disgust and, awkward. If you disable this only; neutral, happy, sad, angry, and blush will be shown

Seasonal outfits.Description: Has the farmer wear different clothing in different seasons, if available.

Seasonal Weather Outfits.Description: Has the farmer wear a different outfit when the weather changes, if available

Seasonal Indoor Outfits.Description: Has the farmer wear different outfits and portraits when inside during the different seasons, if false you will wear the regular outifits and portraits full-time, if available

Festival outfits.Description: Has the farmer wear different clothing for festivals and events, if available

Swimsuit enabled.Description: Has the farmer wear a swimsuit when going into the bathhouse and modded swimsuit loactions, if available

Beach Swimsuit enabled.Description: Has the farmer wear a swimsuit when going on the beach and modded beach loactions in the Summer, if available. Does nothing if swimsuit is disabled

Beach Outfit enabled.Description: Has the farmer wear different outfits when going on the beach and modded beach loactions, if available. Does nothing if swimsuit is disabled, will not work with beach swimsuit

Seasonal Beach Outfits enabled.Description: Has the farmer wear different outfits in the seasons when going on the beach and modded beach loactions, if available. Does nothing if Beach outfit is disabled, will not work with Beach swimsuit

Desert outfit enabled.Description: Has the farmer wear the desert outfit while in the Calico Desert, as well as in the appropriate Walk to Desert Redux and Downtown Zuzu locations, if available

Seasonal Desert outfits enabled.Description: Has the farmer wear differnt desert outfits, during the seasons, while in the Calico Desert, as well as in the appropriate Walk to Desert Redux and Downtown Zuzu locations, if available, Does nothing if desert outfit is disabled

Island outfit enabled.Description: Has the farmer wear the island outfit while on Ginger Island, if available

Island Rain option.Description: Allows the farmer to wear a different outfit while on Ginger Island when it rains (including green rain) there, will also account for any Project Danger Weathers, and Weather Wonders if available.

Gardening Outfit Enabled.Description: Allows the farmer to wear a different outfit while in the greenhouse, if available. Works with custom greenhouse locations

Farming Outfit Enabled.Description: Allows the farmer to wear a different outfit while on the farm if available. Works with custom farms locations

Modded Farming.Description: Allows the farmer to wear the Farming Outfit while in Grampleton Feilds, and some of the Stardew Reality farms, if available. Works with custom farming locations. Does nothing if farming outfit is disabled

Seasonal Farming.Description: Allows the farmer to wear a different Farming Outfits during the seasons while farming, in Grampleton Feilds, and some of the Stardew Reality farms, if available. Works with custom farming locations. Does nothing if farming outfit is disabled

Mining outfit enabled.Description: Has the farmer wear a special outfit for mining, if available

Mountain mining.Description: Has the farmer wear the mining outfit in the Mountains location, near the carpentry shop and the lake. Does nothing if mining outfit is disabled

Mining Outfit Seasonal.Description: Has the farmer wear different mining outfits during the differnt seasons, does both mining and mountain mining. Does nothing if mining outfit is disabled

Lumberjack outfit enabled.Description: Has the farmer wear a special outfit for when in the forest, including modded forest locations, if available

Star Gazing outfit enabled.Description: Has the farmer wear an outfit at night when special things are happening, includeds base game and modded events, if available

Project Danger Weathers.Description: Weather outfits from Project Danger Weather will be used, if available

Project Danger Weathers Indoor Outfits.Description: Indoor weather outfits from Project Danger Weather will be used, Does nothing if Project Danger Weathers is disabled

Weather Wonders.Description: Weather outfits from Weather Wonders will be used, if available

Weather Wonders Indoor Outfits.Description: Weather outfits from Weather Wonders will be used, Does nothing if Weather Wonders is disabled

Use Specific Reactions For Vanilla and S.Description: Enables specific reactions for SVE and Vanilla-Built out for you by Fern Preset, Default:true

Use Specific Reactions For Ridgseide Vil.Description: Enables specific reactions for all NPC that have been configured, in Ridgesdie Village

Use Specific Reactions For East Scarpe.Description: Enables specific reactions for all NPC that have been configured, in East Scarp

Pajamas enabled.Description: Enables pajamas for the farmer, if available

Seasonal Pajamas.Description: Has the farmer wear different pajamas during each of the seasons, if available. Does nothing if pajamas are disabled

Morning pajamas.Description: Has the farmer wear pajamas in the farmhouse in the morning, if available. If disabled, pajamas can still be worn in the evening

Pajamas until.Description: Sets the time AM when the farmer changes from pajamas into their outfit for the day, if morning pajamas are enabled. Pajamas will only be worn in the farmhouse

Evening pajamas.Description: Has the farmer wear pajamas in the farmhouse in the evening, if available. If disabled, pajamas can still be worn in the morning

Pajamas from.Description: Sets the time in the evening when the farmer changes from their outfit for the day into pajamas, if evening pajamas are enabled. Pajamas will only be worn in the farmhouse

Star Gazing outfit.Description: The name of the corresponding outfit in the Fashion Sense wardrobe. Does nothing if the island outfit is disabled. Not case sensitive
